page.content: The data presented in the table offers a comprehensive overview of the commercial applications of Jatobá (Hymenaea courbaril), particularly focusing on its sap extraction in Campo Grande, MS, Brazil. This region has been identified as a significant localization for Jatobá harvesting, given its favorable climatic conditions and the abundance of mature trees. The sap of the Jatobá tree is not only valued for its unique properties but also plays a crucial role in various industries, including food, cosmetics, and traditional medicine.

page.content: In examining the column labeled "Material (vegetal part)," it is evident that the sap is derived from specific parts of the Jatobá tree, which are particularly rich in beneficial compounds. Furthermore, the "Code" column categorizes the various products derived from this material, facilitating efficient tracking and management within commercial supply chains. Understanding the geographic and material context of Jatobá sap is essential for stakeholders aiming to optimize resource utilization and enhance market strategies. As demand for natural and sustainable products continues to rise, the insights drawn from this data may prove invaluable for industry professionals seeking to capitalize on the commercial potential of Jatobá in both regional and global markets.
